title: . Non-interference in disposal of wages. No employer shall limit or otherwise interfere with the
content:
. Non-interference in disposal of wages. No employer shall limit or otherwise interfere with the 
freedom of any employee to dispose of his wages. He shall not in any manner force, compel, or oblige his 
employees to purchase merchandise, commodities or other property from any other person, or otherwise 
make use of any store or services of such employer or any other person.
